calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-10-2026 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-06-2026 Continued To Jul-08-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEFAULT HEARING (PROVE UP)
Off Calendar May-29-2026 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: Damon Carter; Dept. 505
Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:34am and concluding at 9:40am.

Plaintiff Adam D'Amico appearing represented by Aaron Jackson, Esq., via zoom.
Defendant Forest Light Capital, LLC not appearing.

Counsel for Plaintiff presents summary of case and an offer of proof.

Court examines Plaintiff ADAM D'AMICO and he confirms statements made by counsel.

The matter is submitted.

Based on the documents filed, the statement made by Plaintiff and its Counsel, consideration and good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff Adam D'Amico, and against Defendant Forest Light Capital, LLC, as follows:

Damages: $50,000.00
Prejudgment Interest: $8,273.95
Attorney Fees: $4,550.00
Costs: $691.20

TOTAL JUDGMENT: $63,515.15

Proposed judgment signed and filed this date.

DEFAULT HEARING (PROVE UP)
Off Calendar Apr-24-2026 Continued To May-29-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 505
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Judge Daniel Flores: Clerk: Damon Carter; Dept. 505
Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:07am and concluding at 9:16am.

Plaintiff Adam D'Amico appearing represented by Aaron Jackson, Esq., via Zoom.
Defendant Forest Light Capital, LLC not appearing.

Court addresses Counsel for Plaintiff re: it's unsigned declaration of the Plaintiff filed on January 16, 2026.

The court continues this matter to May 29, 2026 at 9:00am in dept. 505 to allow Mr. Jackson time to file signed declaration and serve it the Defendant.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-07-2026 Continued To Jun-03-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Off Calendar Oct-09-2025 Continued To Feb-04-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
